objects_added.role: Maps covariance-estimation and spectral-statistics literature into the DFM-MKC empirical-validation layer.
Requires future residual tests to compare model residual covariance, eigenspectrum, and eigenspace structure against baseline cosmological comparators.
Prevents empirical promotion when covariance estimates collapse to boundary, singular, rank-deficient, unstable, or penalty-dependent artifacts.
Requires DFM-MKC comparator runs to report covariance diagnostics, spectral diagnostics, residual eigenspace diagnostics, and baseline Lambda-CDM comparison before empirical promotion.

source_map.label: Generalized linear spectral statistics of high-dimensional sample covariance matrices
source_map.use_in_program: High-dimensional sample-covariance spectral diagnostics for cosmological residual validation.

source_map.label: Covariance Estimation, Chapter 12, Statistical Planning and Inference
source_map.use_in_program: Baseline covariance-estimation reference for empirical-validation documentation.

source_map.label: Non-boundary covariance matrix estimation in generalized linear mixed models
source_map.use_in_program: Boundary-covariance failure guard for hierarchical, mixed, nuisance-parameter, and residual-stability models.

source_map.label: Symmetry volume 18 issue 2 dark-sector comparison sources
source_map.use_in_program: Comparison map only for alternative dark-sector and cosmology proposals.

promotion_requirements: Covariance matrix positive semidefinite or justified regularized substitute certified
does_not_prove: dark matter phase transition is physically real
